idea-plugin.name: DPG — Declarative PG
idea-plugin.description:
Language support for .dpg (DPG / Declarative PG) source files.

  • Syntax highlighting via the DPG file type
  • Diagnostics, hover, go-to-definition, and completions via dpg-lsp
  • Format on save via dpg fmt

Requires dpg-lsp on $PATH. Install with:
go install github.com/dullkingsman/dpg-lsp/cmd/dpg-lsp@latest
